channel.title: Nexus² Blog
channel.description: Perspectives, product deep-dives and customer stories from the team building Nexus².

item.title: Stop building bots. Start building a layer.
item.description: Most companies are wiring an AI tool onto every product, every page, every team. Here's why that's the wrong unit — and what to build instead.

item.title: Meet Nexi — one assistant across every surface.
item.description: Nexi is the friendly face of the Nexus² platform. Same brain in chat, voice, search, agents and the API.

item.title: From 65% bounce to 35% lower cart abandonment — a Home Furnishings story.
item.description: How a leading home furnishings retailer used Nexus² to help shoppers navigate 7,000+ products.

item.title: Conversations, minutes, tokens — what each one actually means.
item.description: An honest explainer of how Nexus² is metered, why we sell conversations instead of tokens, and how it translates.
